patch.value: Reality documented: score needs contributors from ≥3 orgs/companies with 5+ commits each; contribution funnel prepared (CONTRIBUTING.md current, good-first-issue labels seeded from the backlog, pm-wjfa launch content links back); progress or formal acceptance of the cap recorded here

message: Scorecard normalizes to 0 because all commits come from one person + agents. COMMUNITY-GATED: cannot be engineered directly; the honest lever is the pm-wjfa positioning/launch program + pm-o8um ecosystem trust ladder driving real external contributors. Filed for completeness of the 10/10 program with low confidence by design — closing via 'accepted limitation' on the umbrella is a legitimate outcome.
